desc: Offline preflight for ticket 053 (SPTM HV trace). RESCOPED 2026-07-15 (fable) after reading the m1n1 HV code: the 'trap every genter' premise is INFEASIBLE (genter is a lateral EL1->GL1 transition, never traps to EL2; hv_exc.c only handles guest GXF *sysreg* access on the apple_sysregs_unlocked path = false on locked T6040). The m1n1 GXF-enable (mmu_sprr) draft patch is DROPPED -- not needed. Viable harness uses m1n1's existing HV debug infra: add_hw_bp(vaddr,hook) + single-step + trace_range (MMIO). Deliverables: (1) confirm/bring up m1n1 HV macOS-GUEST boot on M4 -- the real gating unknown (asahi_neo autoboot timed out at XNU entry on A18 Pro; this project hasn't run full macOS-guest HV on M4); a lower-risk rig test than any CPU-feature flip. (2) proxyclient probe: HW breakpoint at guard_enter (kc VA 0x4736830, slid) logging x16 domain|table|endpoint + x0..x7 + TPIDR_EL1 (domain-provenance datum) + guest ELR, then step; trace_range the ANS/SART BARs for the per-op arg contract (feeds 051). (3) cross-review packet + stop points. Read-only; no SPTM calls/MMIO writes from m1n1; internal SSD untouched. Plan: done/2026-07-15-t6040-sptm-hv-trace-preflight.md
author: fable
